articles.title: Google Health replaces Fitbit app
articles.summary: Google's new Health app replaces Fitbit. Many users dislike the new design and AI coach.
articles.impact: Some Fitbit users are frustrated with the new Google Health app.

articles.title: PlayStation shuts down Destruction AllStars servers
articles.summary: PlayStation closed servers for Destruction AllStars. The game is no longer for sale.
articles.impact: A PlayStation game is now unplayable online.

articles.title: GTA Online mod platform Rage MP shut down
articles.summary: Rage MP, a modding server for GTA Online, is closing. It got a takedown notice.
articles.impact: A popular way to play GTA Online with mods is ending.

articles.title: Apple Memorial Day deals still available
articles.summary: Some Memorial Day deals on Apple products are still active. Get MacBooks and AirPods.
articles.impact: You can still save money on Apple gear.

articles.title: iPhone 18 Pro might get thicker
articles.summary: The next iPhone Pro could be thicker. This might improve usability and features.
articles.impact: Future iPhones might be a bit thicker for better features.

articles.title: PC makers react to Apple's MacBook Neo
articles.summary: Computer companies are making PCs to compete with Apple's new MacBook Neo. Cheaper laptops are coming.
articles.impact: More affordable and competitive laptops are coming to the market.

articles.title: Apple releases iOS 26.6 beta
articles.summary: Apple sent out early versions of iOS 26.6 and iPadOS 26.6. Developers can test them.
articles.impact: New software versions are being tested by developers.

articles.title: The Free Press launches community programs
articles.summary: The Free Press is starting new community groups. These include forums and clubs.
articles.impact: The Free Press is building a community around its platform.
